title: pectocarya lateriflora
intro: Pectocarya lateriflora, also known as whorled pectocarya, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Pectocarya lateriflora include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Pectocarya lateriflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile option for those seeking natural remedies.
